title: Language
text: Language Language code for the global object with which you are working. Technical Name: ULAN Expected Value: String of up to 3 characters. It is recommended that you use the country codes from the ISO or ANSI standards. Default Value: None Applies To Menu Message Help Text Glyph Drag-and-Drop Format Language Setups Related Links Language and Locale The language of an application is associated not only with a character set, but with regional conventions for sorting, for expressing numbers, currency, date and time, and so on. The combination of language and region is known as locale. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
